recommended_s6s_scope.reason: Theme P1 families remain materially valuable and safely title-concentrated, while imperative grammar is the only clean grammar follow-up; pattern residuals are now mostly ambiguity-heavy.

pass_criteria.unknown_theme_delta: Negative on both G and H for authorized theme families.
pass_criteria.unknown_pattern_delta: Flat or incidental only; no pattern regression is acceptable because S6S should not touch pattern rules.
pass_criteria.unknown_grammar_delta: Negative only for narrow imperative/procedural subset; broad present-simple bucket must remain stable.
pass_criteria.human_review_required_delta: Negative only through indirect overlap reduction.
pass_criteria.section_heading_delta: Stable within reviewable margin; no direct reduction target.

warnings: Residual pattern backlog is now dominated by quoted, poetic, question-like, and other ambiguity-heavy structures after S6P removed the low-risk declarative mass.
Theme P1 remains safe only as narrow title/book-level mapping families; broad lexical heuristics are still unsafe.
Present-simple/linking grammar residuals are too mixed to justify a broad follow-up before Level I.
